column1: # LONE NIGHT — evolution table
# Owner: Jane. Trigger: weapon at level 8 + paired passive at level 8, then OPEN A CHEST.
# Chests drop from elites. The evolved weapon replaces the base one in the same slot.
# This is the payoff moment of the run: flash the screen white for one frame.
# The evolved STATS live in weapons.tsv as level 9 (one evolution per weapon, so
# the mapping is 1:1 and needs no schema). Icons: cards/evolutions/<into_id>.
# ###  THE `effect` COLUMN IS PLAYER-FACING COPY. app.ts:543 PRINTS IT ON THE      ###
# ###  EVOLUTION SLAM -- the payoff moment of the run. BUDGET: 36 CHARACTERS.      ###
# It used to read `bands on BOTH sides, always, no facing check`, cut at 24 chars to
# `bands on BOTH sides, a...`. "No facing check" is a sentence about our code, shown
# to the player at the best moment in the game. Never again.
# Do NOT prefix the evolved name -- app.ts already draws `into_name` on its own line
# directly above this string. Saying "BONEMEAL." here prints it twice.
# weapon
chain
